CustomField.formula: ( IF( ISBLANK( Short_Term_Projects_Decision_Makers__c ) , 0, 1) +IF( ISBLANK( Short_Term_Projects_KPI_Measured__c ) , 0, 1) +IF( ISBLANK( Short_Term_Projects_Names__c ) , 0, 1) +IF( ISPICKVAL( Short_Term_Projects_Time_Frame__c,"") , 0, 1) +IF( ISBLANK( Future_Projects_Budget_Approval_Status__c ) , 0, 1) +IF( ISBLANK( Future_Projects_Decision_Makers__c ) , 0, 1) +IF( ISBLANK( Future_Projects_KPIs_Measured__c ) , 0, 1) +IF( ISBLANK( Future_Projects_Names__c ) , 0, 1) +IF( ISPICKVAL( Future_Projects_Time_Frames__c, "" ) , 0, 1) )/9
CustomField.label: Projects Completion %
